ops.body:
Resolved and verified. The symbol is present in the published wheel: capt-hook 9.10.0 first shipped touched_comment_blocks in captain_hook/ast_grep.py, and it's in 9.11.0/9.13.0. cc-notes comments.py:22 imports it; cc-notes v0.30.0+ CI (hook-tests, runs against the published wheel) is green.

The observed "1 import errors" was a LOCAL stale install, not an upstream gap: this machine had `uv tool install capt-hook` pinned at v9.2.0 (predates 9.10.0), and `uvx capt-hook` runs the installed tool — so it lacked the symbol. Fixed with `uv tool upgrade capt-hook` → v9.13.0.

Verified 0 import errors: cc-notes `uvx capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test` → 573/573, 0 errors; cc-context consumer → 868/868, 0 errors (comments.py loads cleanly). Criterion met. Closing.
